activeFocus.summary: Stabilize cross-session memory continuity across Q xiaohu and Erliang using shared startup truth instead of local-only files.
Make Erliang startup read the shared startup files first and report missing paths instead of guessing.

openLoops.summary: Teach startup flow to read this shared active-state file as part of the default recovery chain.
openLoops.nextAction: Keep `memory/shared-active-state.json` in the startup read order and require a short recovery confirmation.

openLoops.summary: Connect the existing P1 skills input material to the shared startup chain.
openLoops.nextAction: Define the smallest trigger-based recall layer after shared startup files stabilize.

openLoops.summary: Connect the existing P2 MCP activation input material to the shared startup chain.
openLoops.nextAction: Prioritize Exa first after the shared startup and active-state layers are stable.

doNow: Use shared active focus and open loops to explain current status.
Do not assume Q xiaohu local workspace files are visible on Erliang machine.
doNotDo: Do not invent missing shared files.
Do not resolve shared git conflicts without explicit direction.
Do not treat local-only files as shared source of truth.
